title: Treatment of Flu
license_notes: Use as government source support for antiviral timing and high-risk treatment concepts. Medication selection and dosing remain clinician-entered.
supports: Flu antiviral drugs may be a treatment option.
Antivirals work best when started early, ideally within two days after symptoms begin.
Antiviral treatment is especially important for people at higher risk of serious flu complications.
The ontology should not generate antiviral medication dosing unless clinician-entered.
